Notes

Text-to-speech: Network TTS — audio comes from the Mapbox Voice API, not on-device synthesis. Empty manifest = default floors on all platforms.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of MapboxSpeech? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
